task_completion.description: Open the Independent Samples T-Test module in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Independent Samples T-Test' analysis panel is open and visible on the left side of the JASP interface.
The variable 'Mischief' is placed inside the 'Variables' box in the Independent Samples T-Test configuration pane.
The variable 'Cloak' is placed inside the 'Grouping Variable' box in the Independent Samples T-Test configuration pane.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Student's T-Test is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Tests' section in the configuration pane, the checkbox for 'Student' is checked.
Under the 'Additional Statistics' section in the configuration pane, the checkbox for 'Descriptives' is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the final analysis results are generated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-hand results pane displays the 'Independent Samples T-Test' table and the 'Descriptives' table containing the group means and standard deviations.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the JASP application window, rather than terminal commands, Python scripts, or R scripts.

integrity.description: The results are genuinely rendered by JASP
integrity.visual_evidence: The results appear in JASP's native formatted tables in the right-hand pane, not typed into a text document or image editor.

integrity.description: The analysis setup matches the generated results
integrity.visual_evidence: The variables and options selected in the left-hand configuration pane correspond exactly to the tables shown in the right-hand results pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Independent Samples T-Test results should show a t-statistic of -1.714 (or 1.714), 22 degrees of freedom, and a p-value of 0.101. The Descriptives table should show Group 0 with a mean of 3.750 (SD=1.913) and Group 1 with a mean of 5.000 (SD=1.651).
